name: Herbert L. Shuttleworth Park
description: Herbert L. Shuttleworth Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Amsterdam, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Xtreme Pickle Amsterdam
description: Xtreme Pickle Amsterdam is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Amsterdam, NY. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Chalk lines have been drawn, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like trainers or lessons.
fees: Members only — Free Open Play to members, non-members pay $12. Court reservations free for members, non-members pay $40/hr ($10/hr pp for 4). Visit website for more details
